head: c756e8217884646ce49aa1362cb9e3c516392891
scope: Phase 2 current-HEAD browser/API blocker isolation, live-LLM retry, response-card blocker fix verification, and merged-main rerun

local_admin_sign_in.evidence: Browser sign-in reached workspace; sidebar visible. Direct API sign-in returned 200 with Admin role and eight permissions.

stack_rebuild_recreate.evidence: docker compose up -d --build --force-recreate rebuilt backend/frontend images and recreated backend, frontend, platform/source Postgres, Redis, MySQL, and MSSQL containers.

env_presence.evidence: Required provider, platform DB, source DB, Redis, encryption, and admin env keys were present; values were not printed.

source_connections_admin_policy.evidence: seed_e2e_connection.py reported source_analytics, MySQL Sakila, and MSSQL AdventureWorks healthy with schema_status=success and admin_policy=present.

direct_live_api_submit.evidence: Signed-in Admin direct API submit against source_analytics returned 200 result, row_count=5, columns_count=2, generated_sql present.

browser_live_submit_retry.evidence: Browser submit returned 502; backend log showed Gemini generateContent HTTP 429 Too Many Requests.

direct_live_api_retry.evidence: Direct API retry returned 502 with sanitized error.llmUnavailable; backend log again showed Gemini generateContent HTTP 429.

direct_live_api_retry_2026_07_07_later.evidence: Later bounded live-LLM retry made two signed-in Admin direct API submit attempts against source_analytics. Both returned HTTP 502 with sanitized error.llmUnavailable and no generated SQL. Backend logs showed Gemini generateContent HTTP 429 Too Many Requests for the first retry attempt.

updated_gemini_key_backend_recreate.evidence: After the owner updated the Gemini API key, backend was force-recreated so the process picked up the new .env value. Gemini key presence was confirmed without printing the value.

direct_live_api_after_key_update.evidence: Signed-in Admin direct API submit against source_analytics returned HTTP 200, kind=result, row_count=5, columns_count=2, generated_sql present, and session_id present.

browser_live_submit_after_key_update.evidence: Browser New Chat live submit returned HTTP 200 through /query/submit and rendered one response card with result table, SQL block, and delete action.

browser_follow_up_after_key_update.evidence: Browser follow-up question in the same session returned HTTP 200 and rendered a second response card; both user questions remained visible in-session.

browser_regenerate_after_key_update.evidence: Pre-fix current live response cards did not render copy or regenerate controls, only SQL/table/delete. Direct API regenerate using the saved attempt ID returned HTTP 422 with sanitized error.attemptInvalid / attempt_not_active. Superseded by PR #198 and merged-main browser regenerate pass.

response_card_fix_branch_browser_regener.evidence: On fix/phase2-response-card-actions with rebuilt containers, browser live submit returned HTTP 200 result and rendered copy, regenerate, and delete actions. Copy clicked successfully. Regenerate request used the live active attempt_id, did not use accepted_query_id, returned HTTP 200 kind=result, and rendered copy/regenerate/delete after replacement.

response_card_merged_main_browser_regene.evidence: After PR #198 merged to main at c756e8217884646ce49aa1362cb9e3c516392891, rebuilt containers plus refreshed seed showed browser live submit HTTP 200 result with copy, regenerate, and delete actions. Copy clicked successfully. Regenerate request used the live active attempt_id, did not use accepted_query_id, returned HTTP 200 kind=result, and rendered copy/regenerate/delete after replacement.

response_card_fix_branch_leakage.evidence: Focused browser output scan after live submit/regenerate found no raw provider errors, API keys, stack traces, DB hosts/passwords, or untranslated keys.

session_history_after_key_update.evidence: Session detail API found the live browser session with two saved attempts and result payloads. Browser history listed the follow-up row, first live browser row, and direct API smoke row with source_analytics POSTGRESQL metadata.

leakage_after_key_update.evidence: Browser/API output scan found no raw provider errors, API keys, stack traces, DB hosts/passwords, or untranslated keys.

browser_live_rows_2026_07_07_later.evidence: Superseded by the updated-key retry and PR #198 merged-main rerun: browser live submit, follow-up, history, copy, regenerate, and delete passed.

new_chat_clears_workspace.evidence: Browser New Chat cleared active sidebar selection; prompt focus was not observed.

sidebar_grouping.evidence: Browser sidebar showed Today grouping and current successful live-result session preview.

session_switching_workspace_isolation.evidence: Browser switched empty session to populated session; empty session did not show populated question, populated session did.

delete_session_undo_restore.evidence: Browser delete displayed undo toast; clicking Undo restored the session.

delete_session_permanent_expiry.evidence: Browser delete followed by 5.6 second wait removed the throwaway session.

llm_context_cap_settings.evidence: Browser settings read context cap 3, updated to 2, then restored to 3.

response_card_current_contract.evidence: After PR #198 merged, live response card showed SQL block, result table, connection metadata, copy, regenerate, and delete. Regenerate used active attempt_id and returned HTTP 200 kind=result. Old thumbs/accept/reject UI was absent.

arabic_rtl_surfaces.evidence: Browser /?lng=ar had html dir=rtl, lang=ar, and Arabic New Chat text.

mobile_responsive_smoke.evidence: 390x844 Arabic workspace had no horizontal document overflow.

classification.502_root_cause: Resolved after owner updated Gemini API key and backend was recreated. Direct API and browser submits returned HTTP 200 after the update.
classification.response_card_root_cause: Confirmed product blocker: session-history refresh/dedupe replaced the live local turn carrying the active attempt_id with a saved-history card carrying only accepted_query_id, so regenerate was not rendered. PR #198 prefers live local turns with active attempt IDs over duplicate saved-history rows and decouples copy from regenerate.
classification.stale_container_runtime_mismatch: Initial risk removed by rebuild/recreate before testing.
classification.remaining_gap: Merge the Phase 2 evidence-only PR before starting Phase 3.
